title: Your '0% APR' Deal Hides a $648 Bomb
hook: That 12-month zero-interest offer at checkout isn't free money — it's a trap 73% of shoppers walk right into.
angle: Most people don't know the difference between waived and deferred interest. This shows the exact dollar bomb that triggers at month 12 and the four words in fine print that reveal the trap before you sign.
audience: Anyone who has ever used or been tempted by store financing offers, buy-now-pay-later, or 0% APR deals
key_numbers: 73% of consumers don't understand deferred interest
$648 in backdated interest on a $2,400 purchase at 26.99% APR
1 in 3 people miss the deferred interest deadline
26.99% APR retroactively applied to the full original balance
